prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Inkling was an unusually shy octopus. Where other octopuses were outgoing and social, Inkling hid away in his cozy den, preferring the company of his favorite books and treasures to the busy buzz of the ocean floor. But as he watched the other sea creatures swim by, a longing began to grow in his heart—a yearning for friendship. Determined to overcome his shyness, Inkling gathered up his courage and ventured out into the big, bright world, hoping to find someone who would accept him just as he was.
